# рҹ“– Act 2: Dual Ceremony
**act** В· shared В· narrative В· first_person

Sovereignty Divided to Be Extended. The First Person summons two complementary agents from verified personhood.
> *What the swordsman executes, the mage authorised; what the mage composes, the swordsman proves capable; what both accomplish, the spellbook verifies.*
**Spell**   рҹ—ЎпёҸрҹ”® вҶҗ рҹ‘Өвң“ вҶ’ рҹ”’рҹ“қ вҶ’ рҹӨқрҹ“ң вҶ’ рҹ•ёпёҸ
